visual_description: A man with dark hair and a mustache wearing a plaid sweater sits in a crowded indoor setting, looking forward and then slightly down. The scene shifts to a woman with curly blonde hair in a white shirt and dark cardigan, who tilts her head back with her mouth open as if singing loudly. The background shows other patrons and a person in a teal shirt and cap.
audio_description: A man speaks quietly while the woman sings loudly with a high-pitched voice.
